techniques.evidence_quote: Compromised third party software granting access to cloud environment
User database, including MD5 hashed credentials
Email Address and Password/Security Question Answers
Compromised third party software granting access to cloud environment
User database, including MD5 hashed credentials

attack_chain.description: Attackers compromised a third-party software component used by Live Auctioneers, which granted them access to Live Auctioneers' cloud environment. The breach window spans June 19 to July 11, 2020.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Compromised third party software granting access to cloud environment

attack_chain.description: Using the access gained via the compromised third-party software, the attacker accessed the Live Auctioneers user database containing names, email addresses, passwords (MD5 hashed), and security question answers.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: User database, including MD5 hashed credentials

attack_chain.description: The attacker exfiltrated user PII and credential data from the cloud environment, affecting at least 38,523 Washington state residents. Data included names, email addresses, passwords/security question answers.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Information Compromised: Name; Email Address and Password/Security Question Answers; Other — Number of Washingtonians Affected: 38523

initial_access_vector: Compromised third-party software that granted unauthorized access to the Live Auctioneers cloud environment
